problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
